use std::fs::File;
use std::io::Write;

struct DatabaseConnection {
    path: String,
}

impl Drop for DatabaseConnection {
    fn drop(&mut self) {
        // BAD: Drop performs I/O — blocks the thread, delays cleanup
        let mut file = File::create(format!("{}.shutdown", self.path)).unwrap();
        writeln!(file, "connection closed at {:?}", std::time::Instant::now()).unwrap();
        file.sync_all().unwrap();
    }
}

struct Session {
    conn: DatabaseConnection,
    data: Vec<u8>,
}
